description: BCA, software, IT services, cloud, networking and application careers.

careers.name: BCA Developer
careers.overview: BCA Developer builds, manages and supports software applications, websites, networks, databases and IT systems.
careers.whyChoose: BCA Developer is useful because it offers strong digital career options for students interested in computers beyond only engineering routes.
careers.eligibility: Class 12 with Mathematics or Computer Science is preferred for many BCA/B.Sc IT routes, but requirements vary.
careers.educationPath: Class 12 -> BCA/B.Sc IT/diploma/certification -> Projects -> Internship -> IT role.
careers.workEnvironment: IT companies, startups, corporate technology teams, cloud teams, support centers and product companies.
careers.futureScope: Strong due to software, cloud, automation, business digitization and IT service demand.
careers.aiImpact: AI will speed up coding and support work while system design, debugging and product thinking stay valuable.
cons: Early career may need portfolio or training
